message:
refactor(robot): improve agent type detection and input validation

Enhances robot mode reliability with better agent type detection and
defensive input validation for automated consumers.

Agent Type Detection:
- Prioritize authoritative type from tmux package when available
- Only fall back to loose regex detection for non-NTM agents
  (cursor, windsurf, aider, etc.)
- Consistent detection across PrintStatus and PrintSend

Input Validation:
- PrintSend now validates session name is non-empty before proceeding
- Returns structured error JSON instead of runtime failure
- Enables graceful handling by automation pipelines

Code Quality:
- Standardize struct field alignment for better readability
- Remove trailing newline at end of file
- Consistent formatting throughout type definitions

The authoritative type prioritization fixes cases where pane titles
containing patterns like "claude" in file paths would incorrectly
trigger type detection for non-agent panes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
